issues.description: Trigger is 'OnPlay' but card text says '[End of Your Turn]' – should be 'EndOfTurn'
Condition is 'Always' but card text requires 'If you have 6 or less cards in your hand' – should be a hand count condition

Action is 'SearchDeck' but card effect 'set up to 1 of your {Fish-Man} or {Merfolk} type Characters and up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active' means Rest/Ready action on board, not search. Should be 'Rest' (to ready characters)
Filter 'kind:Any' is incorrect – must filter for {Fish-Man} or {Merfolk} type Characters AND DON!! cards separately
Text '[End of Your Turn]' requires duration 'DuringYourTurn' or 'Permanent' depending on interpretation; current structure missing duration field
